full_text:
Cao Chen 曹諶
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Cao Chen (曹諶). Grandson of Cao Jun, inherits his father’s rank. Cao Chen was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
